{"problem_standardized_math":"Determine whether each of the following optimization problems has a solution, and explain your answer:\n\n\\[\n\\min \\, (x_1+x_2) \\quad \\text{subject to } x_1^2+x_2^2=2,\\; 0\\le x_1\\le 1,\\; 0\\le x_2\\le 1;\n\\]\n\n\\[\n\\min \\, (x_1+x_2) \\quad \\text{subject to } x_1^2+x_2^2\\le 1,\\; x_1+x_2=3;\n\\]\n\n\\[\n\\min \\, x_1x_2 \\quad \\text{subject to } x_1+x_2=2.\n\\]"}
